Name: Draconis Combine
Description: The Draconis Combine is one of the five Successor States of the Star League, located coreward and spinward of Terra. Ruled by House Kurita, the Combine has always been aggressively expansionist—the head of the Combine was the first of the Council Lords to declare himself the new ruler of the collapsing Star League. Regularly in conflicts along its borders with all its neighbors, the Combine is a highly structured, militaristic society, with rulership in the hands of the Coordinator, the commander-in-chief of the Draconis military. The Combine's culture is heavily influenced by the Japanese roots of the ruling family—despite the minority status of those with Japanese ancestry—as this cultural heritage is imposed from above by the predominantly Japanese ruling class. The current leader of the Combine is Coordinator Takashi Kurita.
ReputationStatements: Despicable as you are, House Kurita can still find a use for your services. Attend, Commander: your betters have need of you.
You work for pay, do you not? Mercenaries are tolerated when necessity outweighs principle. Now be quick and efficient about it.
Your reputation suggests capability. You are expected to complete your assigned objectives without deviation.
House Kurita respects your martial prowess, mercenary. Aid us, and we will ensure you are well paid for your efforts.
Once again, the Draconis Combine requires your assistance, mercenary. You have shown restraint and professionalism uncommon among hired forces.
Commander, you know I bring you only the contracts worthy of your talents. This mission serves the stability and security of the Combine.
I apologize for disturbing you, my friend, but the Draconis Combine once again desires your skills. Undertake this task for us and we will see you richly rewarded.
MissionSuccessStatements: A disciplined victory. The Combine approves. Your zeal and tactics are precisely the sort that young cadets could learn from.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: While your retreat would be grounds for censure in one of our soldiers, we understand that a mercenary life is more… complicated. We hope it will not become a habit, however.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Your performance was an embarrassment, Commander. Do not expect the Draconis Combine to forget this failure quickly.
